title: PlayerWorldEdit
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a056f6c655681942b90c2fc7867c0fc5a597d95.png)


**PlayerWorldEdit** is an exceptional Minecraft plugin that **grants players the power of WorldEdit**, enabling them to reshape their Minecraft worlds effortlessly. With its streamlined commands and intuitive functionality, PlayerWorldEdit enhances the building experience, allowing players to unleash their creativity and construct magnificent structures.

![Selection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e76a13575d80a22961428c5f6651d8116f464822.gif)

## Features:
**Visual Selection** – Particle effects highlight selected areas.

**Performance Optimized** – Designed for efficiency and smooth operation.

**Protection Plugin Support** – Compatible with various protection plugins.

**Active Support** – Ongoing updates and assistance available.

## How it works?
- With the WorldEdit Pickaxe in hand, players can use the /pwe set <block> command to replace blocks in selected areas.
- Flexible Settings: The plugin lets you configure how the pickaxe works, including setting a limit on how many times it can be used before breaking.
- Replacing Blocks: Replace blocks in selected areas by specifying the block type. To break blocks, set the block to AIR using /pwe set AIR.
- This makes building and editing easier while keeping the tool usage customizable!

![Building](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/938c4365cf494e4f03069e5cc4bb4f96d24cdfed.gif)

## Permissions and commands:
- **/pwe set <block>** | playerworldedit.use & playerworldedit.set

- **/pwe give <player> <uses>**| playerworldedit.admin

- **/pwe reload** | playerworldedit.admin



### Premium features (Only available in the paid version):
- /pwe wall <block> - You will be able to build walls.
- /pwe replace <old_block> <new_block> - You will be able to replace blocks.

## Support

**If you have any questions or want to try the plugin. Feel free to contact me on discord: https://discord.gg/HsQryuwksP**
